```python
import requests
import json

# 获取最终任务列表，确认所有操作完成
response = requests.post("http://localhost:46445/todo/tasks", json={})
tasks = response.json()["tasks"]

print("=== 最终核查 ===")
print(f"总任务数: {len(tasks)}\n")

# 检查重复项状态
print("【重复项状态】")
for t in tasks:
    if "merged-duplicate" in t.get("tags", []):
        print(f"  {t['task_id']}: {t['title']} - tags:{t['tags']}")

# 检查逾期标记状态
print("\n【逾期标记状态】")
overdue_count = 0
for t in tasks:
    due = t.get("due_date")
    if due:
        if "overdue" in t.get("tags", []):
            overdue_count += 1
            print(f"  ✓ {t['task_id']}: {t['title']} - due:{due}")

print(f"\n总计 {overdue_count} 项已标记overdue")
```
